title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: Caleb Writes Code argues that despite US dominance in chips, models, and applications, China holds a structural advantage in AI infrastructure through centralized power grid management and energy transmission capacity. The video contrasts fragmented US regulatory structures with China's coordinated approach via NDRC and NEA, and examines how major US tech companies navigate grid constraints through off-grid solutions and regional focus on Texas.
